keyword: pet camera with physical privacy shutter
title: Pet Camera With a Physical Privacy Shutter (Camera-Off Trust)
meta: Cameras with a manual/auto lens cover so you control when it's watching.
intro: A physical shutter lets you close the lens when you're home — real privacy, not just software 'off'.

sections.body: A mechanical cover can't be hacked open; software off can glitch.
Some close on a schedule (e.g., when you're home) automatically.
Great if housemates or sitters are wary of always-on cams.

products.name: Pet Cam Local Shutter
products.asin_query: pet camera local shutter no cloud

faq.a: Yes when closed — that's the point; open to monitor.
A closed mechanical shutter blocks the lens entirely.
